danger_signals.visual_form: Physical track elements (ramps, loops, inclines, cylindrical tunnel sections)
danger_signals.meaning: Environmental challenges that require precise driving; collision results in crash/failure state

danger_signals.visual_form: Fuel level gauge on dashboard display
danger_signals.meaning: Running out of fuel before completing lap results in failure

danger_signals.visual_form: Tachometer and speedometer readings relative to track demands
danger_signals.meaning: Excessive speed on technical sections increases crash risk

danger_signals.visual_form: Lap timer displayed in cockpit HUD
danger_signals.meaning: Allotted time window for course completion creates danger of timeout failure

safety_signals.visual_form: Track path rendered clearly from first-person windshield perspective
safety_signals.meaning: Visible driving surface indicates safe navigation corridor

safety_signals.visual_form: Dashboard gauges (oil, temp, amp) displaying normal readings
safety_signals.meaning: Vehicle in operational condition; no mechanical failure state

safety_signals.visual_form: Speedometer and tachometer within nominal ranges
safety_signals.meaning: Appropriate gear selection and throttle control maintains vehicle stability

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: First-person cockpit view with visible dashboard instruments; track environment rendered with 3D polygon geometry
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Player vehicle responds to realistic car physics; steering wheel force feedback communicates road conditions

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Stationary cockpit view with all dashboard displays initialized; ignition key available
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Vehicle remains stationary until ignition activated and transmission engaged

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Track includes enhanced stunt obstacles: corkscrew loop, 45° inclined hill, jump ramps, cylindrical tunnel sections
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Vehicle must navigate extreme angles and vertical elements; air-based jumps demonstrate physics simulation

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Track environment rendered with faster visual scrolling; speedometer and tachometer readings elevated
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Manual 4-speed transmission allows gear optimization; improper shifting risks engine stall

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Instant Replay feature activated; cockpit view resets
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Vehicle returns to starting position; lap timer resets for retry

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Track boundaries visible; off-road timer activated when vehicle leaves defined racing surface
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Time penalty accumulates for driving outside course; incentivizes return to track

environmental_storytelling.example: Each of the seven available cars (three manual transmission, one automatic, three variants in expanded port) displays unique dashboard layouts reflecting individual vehicle identity and performance characteristics
Stunt track progression from basic obstacles to advanced challenges (dual landing ramps, jump loop, corkscrew) communicates increasing complexity and skill requirements
Variable track lengths (Autocross ~30 seconds, original track ~90 seconds, Super Stunt ~180 seconds) create different tension profiles and communicate track significance through temporal demand
Windshield framing and dashboard permanence in view establishes player as vehicle operator, not external observer; reinforces simulation authenticity

entity_behavioral_tells.behavior: Stationary; requires ignition key activation to initialize
No movement despite throttle input; requires proper gear selection
Engine stall occurs; vehicle loss of control requiring restart
Responds to complex track geometry; airborne physics simulated during jumps; forces demonstrate weight and momentum
Timer penalty accumulates; visual/audio cue signals deviation from intended path
Ghost vehicle or time reference appears; communicates baseline for player to beat

notes: Race Drivin' is a driving simulation with minimal narrative world-state. Communication is primarily mechanical/automotive rather than political/factional. The game uses first-person cockpit perspective as primary manifestation layer—all world-state information flows through dashboard instrumentation and track geometry. No factions, danger from NPCs, or political situations exist in this paradigm. Danger is entirely environmental (obstacles, time limits, fuel management) and mechanical (transmission, stalling). Safety signals emerge from instrument stability and proper vehicle operation. World-state is communicated through vehicle response to physics simulation and track configuration rather than visual narrative elements.
